_comment: Tools ordered: LIVE first, then IN DEVELOPMENT dashboards (RAG, FnO PaperTrade, AI Branding), then COMING SOON, then disabled. _status is shown in ToolIndex info popup — use it as the build tracker string. group = sidebar column: personalized | enterprise | experimental.

tools._status: LIVE — MCP server built, frontend exists, backend partial
tools.name: Gmail Intelligence Agent

tools._status: LIVE — frontend + pipeline backend exists, AgentExecutor upgrade pending
tools.name: ReAct Research Agent

tools._status: LIVE — frontend + pipeline backend exists, planning agent upgrade pending
tools.name: AI Scout — Planning Agent

tools._status: IN DEVELOPMENT — dashboard UI + illustrative data; LangGraph session + market feeds not wired. Track: Phase 1–3 (config, logger, holidays) → pipeline modules in Build Status tab.
tools.name: Autonomous FnO PaperTrade

tools._status: LIVE — read-only Databricks Unity Catalog; server .env DATABRICKS_*
tools.name: Databricks Unity Browser

tools._status: LIVE v1 — NL → read-only SQL; DATABRICKS_*; Gemini (primary) + Anthropic fallback
tools.name: Databricks Conversational SQL

tools._status: LIVE v1 — Databricks-native API + dedicated UI; one-time run + interval schedule registry
tools.name: Synthetic Data Generation (Databricks AI)

tools._status: COMING SOON — Needs Databricks AI pipeline health API + alerting hooks
tools.name: Pipeline Health Check (Databricks AI)

tools._status: IN DEVELOPMENT — full configurator UI + local draft (localStorage); Databricks ingest/retrieve/CRAG not wired. Track: tabs 1–6 = build order; Summary tab = export contract for backend.
tools.name: RAG Configurator (Databricks AI)

tools._status: COMING SOON — Build Slot 9 | Needs Databricks MCP server
tools.name: Databricks Intelligence Agent

tools._status: COMING SOON — Build Slot 5 | Needs knowledge base curation (your expertise)
tools.name: Data Architecture Advisor

tools._status: COMING SOON — Build Slot 8 | Needs Google Calendar MCP server
tools.name: Meeting Intelligence Agent

tools._status: COMING SOON — Build Slot 6 | Most complex — 3 agents + orchestrator
tools.name: Multi-Agent Pipeline Designer

tools._status: COMING SOON — Build Slot 10 | Build LAST — needs all other agents complete
tools.name: Personal AI Orchestrator

tools._status: IN DEVELOPMENT — dashboard UI + illustrative data; FastAPI agents + DB not wired. Track: Week 1 foundation (see Overview + Build Status tab).
tools.name: AI for Personal Branding as a Service
